title: Electric Bug Zapper, PALONE UV Light Insect Fly Killer Insect Bug Catcher, Moth Mosquito Killer Indoor Outdoor, Fly Zapper Repellent with Washable Tray, Garden Yard Kitchen Commercial Industrial
bullet_points: Reliable Pest Zapper: PALONE electric pest zapper includes, electric grid, trapping LED light, protective fence and collection tray. Two UV lamps attract almost all flying insects through special wavelengths, and the 3200V high-voltage power grid captures them and electrocutes them. Ideal for use in garages, sheds, warehouses and homes.

Effective And Eco-Friendly: PALONE bug zapper effectively solves mosquito problems through physical means, safe and healthy. Unlike traditional harsh products, this bug zapper is chemical-free, non-toxic and has no odor.

Easy To Use: Connect to power via USB socket. On the right side of the fly killer is the power button and USB port. The included USB cable is black (1.5 meters, 59 inches). Note: Please place the mosquito trap on a flat surface; the product does not have a battery and needs to be connected to a power source for use.

Hangable and Detachable: The bug zapper is equipped with a stainless steel chain (approximately 52.7 cm, 20.7 inches), the bug zapper can be hung on treetops, eaves, walls, and is suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Additionally, the perimeter protective net and bottom tray are removable.

Safety Net Protection, Easy To Clean: PALONE insect zapper has a high-quality protective net on the outside, which can effectively kill mosquitoes while avoiding accidental contact with the internal 3200V high-voltage power grid. Collect mosquito corpses on the bottom tray, open the fence, clean the grid and light tubes with paper towels or brushes, let the corpses fall into the chassis, clean, dry and install them back.
